text.title: Regression Eval Before Fix Rule Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping incident reproducibility and eval-set capability to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf is a conclusion ref bound to a rule id.

conclusion.verdict: skip — no agent or no eval surface
mark no-fix; transient with explicit owner sign-off
commit failing eval first; do not open fix PR yet
iterate fix until eval flips and no others regress

example.trace: capable=true → reproducible=true → eval_present=false → eval-before-fix → commit eval/regressions/INC-441.jsonl first

text.example: Canonical traversal from root question through branches to a single conclusion.
